userIds.title: Slack User IDs
userIds.description: A comma separated list of IDs for users and agents who were added to the channel.
userIds.einstein:description: A comma separated list of users who were added to the channel. A single Slack User ID should be represented as <@U12345678>. If a string like U123456789 is provided as output, add the <@ and > characters at the start and end of the string respectively. For example, the Slack User ID U123456789 is converted to <@U123456789>. A comma separated list of Slack User IDs will be provided to you. If applicable, apply the conversion to each Slack User ID in the comma separated string.
